components.name: helix-bioage
components.description: ADR-034: deterministic biological-age estimate (Levine PhenoAge) from routine labs — non-diagnostic

components.name: helix-cohort
components.description: ADR-024: privacy-preserving cohort feature extraction (federation primitive) — generalization + cell-suppression + differential privacy

components.name: helix-connect
components.description: ADR-029: live connector clients (FHIR/SMART + wearables) — transport-trait core with FHIR->ProvRecord parsing and the degradation ladder

components.name: helix-embed
components.description: ADR-027: learned MiniLM text embeddings (local GPU) wired into helix-retrieval

components.name: helix-escalation
components.description: ADR-009: red-flag escalation & clinician-in-the-loop registry for Helix

components.name: helix-evidence
components.description: ADR-006: evidence tiering and explicit abstention policy for Helix

components.name: helix-evolve
components.description: ADR-035: Darwin-style parameter evolution — tunes non-safety pipeline params against a labeled eval set; safety thresholds frozen

components.name: helix-fed
components.description: ADR-030: federation transport — opt-in, DP-gated cohort contribution over the helix-cohort privacy primitive

components.name: helix-focus
components.description: ADR-032: deterministic, non-diagnostic 'focus areas' selection from the user's own records

components.name: helix-genome
components.description: ADR-021: user-owned genome ingestion & pharmacogenomics (rvDNA backend) -> Helix ProvRecords + prescriber advisories

components.name: helix-llm
components.description: ADR-026: on-device LLM analyst — narrates grounded facts via a local-GPU model, with an anti-hallucination number-guard

components.name: helix-neural
components.description: Integration adapter: ruvnet/ruv-neural gamma-entrainment/EEG session evidence -> Helix ProvRecords (research-grade screening, not diagnosis)

components.name: helix-numeric
components.description: ADR-007: deterministic numeric/trend engine for Helix (the LLM never does arithmetic)

components.name: helix-ocr
components.description: ADR-022: OCR lab-document ingestion (RuVector OCR backend) -> gated, conservative-confidence ProvRecords

components.name: helix-ontology
components.description: ADR-004: canonical ontology normalization (LOINC/RxNorm/SNOMED/ICD-10/UCUM) for Helix

components.name: helix-pipeline
components.description: ADR-002/005: the grounded-answer pipeline wiring Helix's anti-hallucination crates

components.name: helix-provenance
components.description: ADR-005: provenance records and retrieval-grounding enforcement for Helix

components.name: helix-refranges
components.description: NHANES-derived population reference intervals — a labeled FALLBACK when a lab supplies no reference range

components.name: helix-retrieval
components.description: ADR-023: semantic retrieval contract over the health graph (RuVector HNSW/GraphRAG backend)

components.name: helix-score
components.description: ADR-016: transparent, decomposable, non-diagnostic 0-100 health score for Helix

components.name: helix-sensing
components.description: ADR-020: RuView WiFi-CSI contactless ambient sensing -> Helix ProvRecords + escalation screening flags

components.name: helix-timeline
components.description: ADR-031: longitudinal health-score timeline — deterministic, methodology-versioned, trend-first

components.name: helix-vault
components.description: ADR-001/013: user-owned, local-first encrypted vault boundary (XChaCha20-Poly1305) for Helix

components.name: helix-verifier
components.description: ADR-008: independent verifier/critic that re-derives every claim from source before it reaches the user

components.name: helix-vision
components.description: ADR-028: learned visual encoder (local GPU) — layout-only vision captioning + MiniLM embedding for helix-visual

components.name: helix-visual
components.description: ADR-025: visual RAG over medical documents/images (rupixel backend) — tile embeddings + MaxSim late interaction

components.name: helix-wasm
components.description: WASM binding exposing the Helix analytic pipeline to the web/mobile UI
